title: Homepage Mixed Order Contract + Editorial Preview Restore + Safeguard

homepage_contract.collapse_rule: Deferred sections may collapse when their feed is empty, but the relative order of rendered sections must still follow the intended order contract.

data_behavior: keeps right panel and info panel in open state
shows title, author, CTA, and snippet or TOC row

root_cause.mixed_order_mismatch: Homepage runtime never normalized bookish into the primary mixed group, so bookish remained in #gg-mixed-deferred after the blog listing.
root_cause.editorial_preview_regression: InfoPanel hover-preview gating ignored homepage blog state because canHoverPreview only accepted feed/listing surfaces, leaving homepage / with a preview shell that never opened on hover or focus.

restored_before_safeguard: Editorial preview on / now opens again from hover and focus inside the right sidebar info panel.
Homepage mixed order on / now places bookish in the primary mixed group before deferred mixed sections.
safeguard_added: Added listing-like homepage surface detection for editorial preview behavior.
Added homepage mixed order normalization in both GG.app.ensureBuckets() and GG.app.rehydrate().
Extended live-smoke to assert true homepage mixed order and homepage editorial preview shell/hover/focus/content.

live_smoke.source: Successful CI/deploy workflow results plus current local before/after proof artifacts for /.

freeze_mode.note: Comments rail freeze remains in effect; TASK-P1.08C is limited to homepage mixed order and homepage editorial preview runtime repair plus smoke safeguarding.

accepted_limitations: Homepage mixed order on / is runtime-normalized over Blogger-emitted widget containers.
Deferred homepage mixed sections may stay collapsed when their feeds are empty.
Homepage editorial preview remains runtime-owned in the right sidebar info panel rather than source-pure HTML state.
Comments compose lane remains SKIP until open-comment fixtures are configured.
